problem id: 78d9d61d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11100000 -> 00111000
  01000101 -> 10010001
  11001101 -> 10110011
  00010111 -> 10000101
  10101011 -> 10101010
  00001010 -> 00000010
  10011111 -> 10100111
  00000110 -> 00000001
  11011101 -> 10110111

query: 00100110
predicted answer: 00001001
